    Subclasses of WriteOptions in org.springframework.data.cassandra.core
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    DeleteOptions
    Extension to WriteOptions for use with DELETE operations.
    class 
    InsertOptions
    Extension to WriteOptions for use with INSERT operations.
    class 
    UpdateOptions
    Extension to WriteOptions for use with UPDATE operations.

    Method
    Description

    CassandraBatchOperations.delete(Iterable<?> entities, WriteOptions options)
    Add a collection of deletes with given WriteOptions to the batch.

    Add delete to the batch.

    Add delete to the batch.
    ReactiveCassandraBatchOperations

    Add a collection of deletes with given WriteOptions to the batch.

    Add a collection of inserts with given WriteOptions to the batch.

    Add an insert to the batch.

    Add an insert to the batch.

    Create an UPDATE statement by mapping objectToUpdate to Update considering UpdateOptions.

    Add common WriteOptions options to Update CQL statements.
    static <T> T
    QueryOptionsUtil.addWriteOptions(QueryOptionsUtil.CqlStatementOptionsAccessor<T> accessor, WriteOptions writeOptions)
    Add common WriteOptions options to CQL statements through QueryOptionsUtil.CqlStatementOptionsAccessor.
